title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm out and about with Hishi
Amazon...

I follow her gaze to see a claw machine filled with
Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
My dorm's gonna get new students moving in
soon.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I was thinking of getting 'em a little welcome gift
or something. Those plushies'll probably work
great, don'tcha think?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I know, right?! Okay, time to win all the plushies
and empty out that machine!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
...Or so I'd like to, but I don't have the funds to
play! Darn it all!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: What?! You'd really get them for me, Teach?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Nice! Show me you're made of, then! Grab as
many as you can!
There's no way I can fail!
